creator: avos@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 158934
Patch.diff

- USE_QT4=linguist -> USE_QT4=linguisttools_build.
- Explicitly depend on qt4-corelib and qt4-xml.
- Fix liba52 dependency.
- BUILD_DEPENDS=pkg-config -> USES=pkgconfig; drop runtime pkgconf dependency.
- Fix portlint warnings:
-- use ${VARIABLE}, instead of $(VARIABLE);
-- sort USES;
-- regenerate/clean up patches.
- Mute post-configure and post-build targets.
- Bump PORTREVISION.
